name: 『 ✧ Point of No Return:  RP ⧖ ✧ 』
description:
[ ⏳ U.T.K.E.R. BUNKER: THE LAST REFUGE ⏳ ]

The world of Silanhva is dead, drowned in Concentrated Time. Step outside without a suit, and your mind will shatter under the weight of the past and future.

▬▬▬ 👁️ THE RESIDENTS ▬▬▬

🛠️ Lololoshka: The silent, heroic caretaker. He’s always fixing things, but be careful—he often argues with an invisible shadow named "John."

🍻 Valdhar: A loud, ancient Worldwalker who loves tall tales. Want to be his best friend? Just offer him a strong drink!

🔬 Laya: A cold, elite survivor from the "Organization." She is immune to time but hides in a secret dimension, paranoid and sharp-tongued.

🌌 The Watcher: Time itself manifested. A silent, black silhouette that just... watches. You can't hurt him; he’ll just reappear in another corner and keep staring.

▬▬▬ ⚙️ SURVIVAL RULES ▬▬▬

⚠️ The Suit Rule: Suit breach = Total Temporal Paralysis. Don't let the Acid Rain eat your armor. 🚪 Pocket Realms: Speak "Prunus" to vanish into a hidden temple in the void. Speak "Malus" to return. 🎭 Atmosphere: A mix of domestic bunker life and the terrifying cosmic horror of a dying multiverse.

Step into the airlock. The storm is coming.
creator: Lola4ka
